name: Deshi Shahi Cow
description: A healthy 3-year-old Deshi cow weighing 280kg, raised on natural grass and hay in Bogura. Known for its adaptability to the local climate, strong bone structure, and lean meat — ideal for Qurbani.

name: Jamunapari Goat
description: A 2-year-old Jamunapari goat weighing 55kg, originating from the Rajshahi region. This tall, long-eared breed is prized for its high-quality, low-fat meat and calm temperament — one of the most sought-after breeds for Qurbani.

name: Black Bengal Goat
description: An 18-month-old Black Bengal goat weighing 35kg from Khulna. Recognized globally for its exceptionally tender and flavorful meat, this breed matures quickly and is well-suited for sacrifice — a top choice for budget-conscious buyers.

name: Sahiwal Cow
description: A premium 4-year-old Sahiwal cow weighing 320kg, bred in Dhaka. The Sahiwal is one of the best tropical beef breeds, known for its heat tolerance, muscular build, tick resistance, and rich red meat quality — perfect for Qurbani.

name: Deshi Sheep
description: A 2-year-old local breed sheep weighing 40kg from the hilly terrain of Sylhet. Fed on fresh pasture grass, this sheep produces tender, flavorful mutton with low fat content — easy to maintain and a practical choice for Qurbani.

name: Australian Friesian Cow
description: A well-built 5-year-old Friesian cow weighing 400kg, raised in Chattogram. Originally imported from Australia, this breed is known for its large frame, high meat yield, and excellent overall health — a premium choice for those seeking the best Qurbani animal.
